hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' | grep -q 'gh pr merge' && graphify update . || true
f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && echo "File exists: use Edit, not Write (unless full rewrite)"

f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); lim=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.limit // empty'); [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && [ -z "$lim" ] && lines=$(wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) && [ "$lines" -gt 200 ] && echo "Large file ($lines lines): use offset+limit"

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
